claims.summary: Near-zero projection columns could amplify noise or create dead dimensions.
claims.disposition: verify finite norms, near-zero detection, dead-dimension status, and fixed checksum

claims.summary: The fixed-seed projection must remain exactly repeatable.
claims.disposition: verify deterministic basis and precision-audit regressions

claims.summary: Ghost vibrancy and feedback boundaries need explicit evidence.
claims.disposition: verify ProjectionPrecisionAuditV1 and smooth feedback boundary tests

claims.summary: Changing basis weights, feedback gain, or clamp ceilings changes live codec behavior.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait
